pages.title: Alliances Formed
pages.text: I look back on these weeks and hardly recognize the person who stumbled into $(thing)Willowmere$() with nothing but questions and a single Cobblemon. I have allies now — true ones, tested by disagreement and forged in shared purpose.$(br2)$(thing)Sera$() stands beside me, steadfast and sharp-tongued. $(thing)Aren$() lends the weight of the guild. $(thing)Mayor Theron$() offers Willowmere as neutral ground. And across the factions, doors that were once closed have begun, slowly, to open.$(br2)I have earned my first gym badge. I have chosen a path — and lived with the consequences of that choice. The world has grown larger with each step, and I have grown to meet it.

pages.title: The Wider World Beckons
pages.text: But Aetheria is vast, and I have seen only a corner of it. Beyond the plains and the settled lands, there are kingdoms I have only heard of in stories. The $(thing)Skyborn$() citadels above the clouds. The deep forests where ancient things still move. The coastal cities where trade and intrigue flow like the tide.$(br2)The $(thing)Gates$() grow more challenging, their ranks climbing toward trials I am not yet ready to face. The factions' conflicts deepen as resources dwindle and old resentments surface. And always, always, the sky hums with a presence that watches and waits.$(br2)Whatever I have built here is a foundation, nothing more. The true test lies ahead — in the wider world, in the harder choices, in the questions I have been avoiding.$(br2)It is time to stop surviving and start shaping what $(thing)Aetheria$() will become.
